第一，本书主角的人物情感很真实且符合当代社会的现状——睚眦必报
第二，内容丰富连贯，符合人的正常思维。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707584013,"group_id":"7052970753171393550","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"只有奋斗的人才配拥有未来","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9bFxR+PS/WoHuBjuWeWQp4=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0bbe9f5a93814d2ebff89b5ae0912dd7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776703079&x-signature=1EnmDa0QwIbF2mR25IVL80GiCao%3D","user_id":"954841087094183","user_name":"風骨～～"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"954841087094183","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7052970753171393550","book_info":{"abstract":"机缘巧合之下，穿越到洪荒大陆。
古天顿时慌得不行，幸好绑定了超级炼化系统。
世间万物，皆可炼化。
炼化弑神枪，修成杀戮大道，获得罗睺传承。
炼化不周山，成就混沌神魔之躯，获得九转玄元功传承
不小心牵了一下后土的小手，下意识点了一下系统，结果后土成了自家小媳妇。
